title: Analytics DB: Banco de Análises Pré-Processadas + Comando analyze
plan: Create src/db/analytics_schema.py with CREATE TABLE statements for all 11 tables (global_stats, session_stats, daily_stats, positional_stats, stack_depth_stats, leak_analysis, tilt_analysis, ev_analysis, bet_sizing_stats, hand_matrix, redline_blueline) plus analytics_meta, each with game_type column and proper indexes
Create src/db/analytics_connection.py with get_analytics_connection() singleton for analytics.db (following existing connection.py pattern with WAL mode)

Create src/db/analytics_repository.py with AnalyticsRepository class providing CRUD methods: save/load for each analysis type, metadata management (last_run_timestamp, source_hash), and clear_all for --force mode

Create src/analytics_runner.py with AnalyticsRunner class that orchestrates: instantiates CashAnalyzer + TournamentAnalyzer + EVAnalyzer + LeakFinder + TiltAnalyzer, runs all get_*() methods, serializes results to JSON, and persists via AnalyticsRepository
Implement incremental processing logic: compute hash of poker.db (file hash or row count), compare with analytics_meta.source_hash, skip if unchanged (unless --force)
Add 'analyze' subcommand to main.py following existing CLI pattern: analyze_parser with --force and --type cash|tournament|all arguments, cmd_analyze handler
Verify .gitignore already covers analytics.db (*.db wildcard exists)
Test the full pipeline: python main.py analyze --type all --force, verify analytics.db is created with populated tables
